title: Cursor + Postman = ❤️ Learn how to connect Cursor to your Postman workspace using MCP. In under 10 minutes, you'll see how to: - Set up the Postman MCP server in Cursor - Search your APIs and… | Sterling Chin
author: Sterling Chin
text:
Cursor + Postman = ❤️ Learn how to connect Cursor to your Postman workspace using MCP. In under 10 minutes, you'll see how to: - Set up the Postman MCP server in Cursor - Search your APIs and collections from the editor - Generate client code without leaving your IDE - Keep your API documentation in sync as you build If you're using an AI-powered editor and building APIs with Postman, this is the workflow. Watch: https://lnkd.in/gEXYAZX6
I've written a blog on it here: https://postmandeveloperrelations.substack.com/p/how-to-use-postmans-mcp-server-in?r=2q6p2j Postman MCP docs: https://learning.postman.com/docs/developer/postman-api/postman-mcp-server/overview/
